subTitle: Shera's cousin transfers to his school and starts troubling him. However, Shera tries different ways to make his cousin to trouble Titoo and his brother instead.

subTitle: Titoo fakes being ill in order to go to a movie premiere instead of school. But his mother thinks he is deathly ill and decides to admit him to the hospital.

subTitle: During a friendly game of cricket between Shera and Titoo, Shera is knocked unconscious. But when he wakes up he seems to think that he is a five-year-old boy.

subTitle: Annoyed by how much Titoo procrastinates, his mother warns him to learn to do things on time or face punishment. So in order to spite her, Titoo decides to ignore all the work that he had to do.

subTitle: Titoo brings home a stray puppy he found on the street, but Golu is deathly afraid of dogs. So Titoo sets out to help Golu conquer his fears.

subTitle: In order to annoy Shera, Golu claims that Titoo is actually the topper in class. So now, in order to not humiliate Golu, Titoo is forced to ace the exams and prove him right.

subTitle: Titoo's mother starts to put pressure on him to make sure that her dream of him becoming a doctor comes true. But Titoo turns it around on her by misdiagnosing people and showing her she was wrong.
